title: Sets: Collections Without Duplicates
subtitle: When you only care about uniqueness

sections.heading: What's a Set?
sections.body: A **Set** is a collection where every value is unique. Try to add a duplicate, and it's silently ignored. Like a hash map without the values.

sections.title: A guest list
sections.body: You write each name once. If Aria shows up twice, you don't write her name again. You just want to know — is she invited? Set says yes or no, instantly.

questions.question: What happens when you add a duplicate to a Set?
questions.explanation: Sets enforce uniqueness silently. Duplicates are simply not added.
